source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage / Crane / Pollution

event.top_event: Loss of Containment - Synthetic Based Mud Discharge
actions_taken: Employee closed master dump valve to stop losses
Rig investigation identified obstructed butterfly valve locking handle
event.summary: On 25-MAR-2014 at 0600 hours, a rig employee opened the master dump valve while cleaning the pre-mix pit. A butterfly valve locking handle that had broken loose and lodged in pit #2's dump valve prevented full closure, resulting in discharge of 42 barrels (approximately 15.3 ppg Synthetic Based Mud, containing 23.5 bbls oil equivalent) into offshore waters. No personnel were monitoring the pits when the master dump valve was opened.

hazards.name: Pressurized mud system with multiple interconnected dump valves
Mechanical failure of valve locking mechanisms

threats.name: Butterfly valve locking handle fracture and lodgement in dump valve
Unmonitored opening of master dump valve
Partial obstruction preventing full valve closure

consequences.name: Discharge of Synthetic Based Mud to offshore waters
Environmental pollution - 42 barrels mud lost overboard

controls.name: Pit dump valve design with individual isolation valves
controls.barrier_role: Prevent unintended discharge by isolating individual mud pits
controls.lod_basis: Primary containment barrier for mud pit systems

supporting_text: a butterfly valve locking handle broke from the valve handle and became lodged into pit #2's dump valve. This prevented full closure for the #2 pit's dump valve

controls.name: Personnel monitoring of mud pits during dump operations
controls.barrier_role: Detect abnormal discharge and stop operations immediately
controls.lod_basis: Human observation to detect unintended losses

supporting_text: No personnel were monitoring the pits at the time the master dump valve was opened
After opening the master dump valve and returning to the pits, the employee discovered that another pit (pit #2) containing Synthetic Based Mud was losing fluid

controls.name: Valve locking handle mechanical integrity and maintenance
controls.barrier_role: Prevent mechanical failure of valve locking mechanisms
controls.lod_basis: Equipment reliability to prevent component fracture

supporting_text: Butterfly valve locking handle breaking loose from valve handle and falling into the #2 pit

controls.name: Procedure requiring verification of valve closure before opening master dump valve
controls.barrier_role: Ensure all pit dump valves are fully closed before master valve operation
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control to prevent unintended discharge

supporting_text: Needing to drain the seawater from the pit, the rig employee opened the dump valve for the pre-mix pit. Once open, the employee went below the pit deck and opened the master dump valve.

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
